title: The Swamp Priest Appears
description: The battles across Upper Yard widen as the Shandia, priests, and Straw Hats all collide in the forest.
scene: Across pages 7, 8, 9, 10, this scene centers on Chopper, Gedatsu, Gan Fall, Nami, Zoro. The battles across Upper Yard widen as the Shandia, priests, and Straw Hats all collide in the forest.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What are the three of you doing!!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: These two keep pulling me down.

dialogue.speaker: Gedatsu
dialogue.text: Gedatsu-Sama! You will tire in that position!!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Your trials are unworthy of mention!

summary: The battles across Upper Yard widen as the Shandia, priests, and Straw Hats all collide in the forest.
